essential_assertions.text: assert(IsComposite(a as int)) by { assert(a as int > 1); assert(a as int % 3 == 0); assert(2 <= 3 && 3 <= a as int - 1 && a as int % 3 == 0); };
assert(IsComposite(b as int)) by { assert(b as int > 1); assert(b as int % 2 == 0); assert(2 <= 2 && 2 <= b as int - 1 && b as int % 2 == 0); };

placeholders.original_text: assert(IsComposite(a as int)) by { assert(a as int > 1); assert(a as int % 3 == 0); assert(2 <= 3 && 3 <= a as int - 1 && a as int % 3 == 0); };
assert(IsComposite(b as int)) by { assert(b as int > 1); assert(b as int % 2 == 0); assert(2 <= 2 && 2 <= b as int - 1 && b as int % 2 == 0); };
